welcome.usernameNotSet:
Hi {{user}}, welcome to .fmbot.
To use this bot you first need to add your Last.fm account.

Use the buttons below to sign up or connect your existing Last.fm account.
login.alreadyConnected:
You have already connected a Last.fm account. To change the account you've connected to .fmbot, use the buttons below.

Using Spotify and having problems with your music not being tracked or it lagging behind? Re-logging in again will not fix this, please use `{{command}}` for help instead.
login.welcome:
Welcome to .fmbot. To use .fmbot, a Last.fm account is required.

Use the buttons below to sign up or connect your existing Last.fm account.
errors.rateLimited: Sorry, you're being rate-limited. Please cool down and wait a minute before using commands again.
errors.sessionRequired:
While you have set your username, you haven't connected .fmbot to your Last.fm account yet, which is required for the command you're trying to use.
Please reconnect your Last.fm account with the button below.
errors.noScrobbles.header: The Last.fm user **{{user}}** has no listening history on [their profile]({{url}}) yet.
errors.noScrobbles.trackMyMusic: Just created your Last.fm account? Make sure you set it to [track your music app](https://www.last.fm/about/trackmymusic).
errors.noScrobbles.spotify: Using Spotify? You can link that [here](https://www.last.fm/settings/applications). This can take a few minutes to start working.
errors.noScrobbles.disclaimer: Please note that .fmbot is not affiliated with Last.fm or Spotify.
errors.recentScrobblesFailed: Something went wrong while trying to get recent scrobbles.
errors.lastFmFailure: We tried fetching your data from Last.fm, but they returned an error. Please try again in a bit.
errors.lastFmLoginRequired:
We couldn't fetch your data, your recent tracks are marked private on Last.fm.

Change this in your [privacy settings](https://www.last.fm/settings/privacy), or authorize .fmbot to access private scrobbles with {{loginCommand}}.
errors.lastFmBadAuth: We couldn't reach Last.fm for you, your session is invalid or Last.fm is having issues. You can try logging in again with {{loginCommand}} or trying again in a bit.
errors.lastFmSessionExpired: We couldn't fetch your data, .fmbot got disconnected from your Last.fm account. Please re-authorize with {{loginCommand}} and use the 'Connect Last.fm account' button.
errors.lastFmNoResult.artist: Last.fm didn't return an artist for your search.
errors.lastFmNoResult.album: Last.fm didn't return an album for your search.
errors.lastFmNoResult.track: Last.fm didn't return a track for your search.
errors.lastFmNoResult.artistList: Last.fm didn't return an artist list for your search.
errors.lastFmUserNotFound: Last.fm didn't return a result. If you're searching for a user who recently changed their username, they should re-run `/login`.
errors.dmNotSupported: This command is not supported in DMs.
errors.embedLinksRequired: The bot is missing the `Embed Links` permission in this channel, so it can't reply properly. Please grant it server-wide via `Server Settings` > `Roles`, or per-channel via the channel permissions.
errors.indexRequired:
To use .fmbot commands with server-wide statistics, you need to create a memberlist cache first.

Please run `{{refreshCommand}}` to create this.
Note that this can take some time on large servers.
errors.indexOutdated:
Server member cache is out of date, it was last updated over 180 days ago.
Please run `{{refreshCommand}}` to update the cached memberlist.
errors.commandNotEnabledChannel: The command you're trying to execute is not enabled in this channel.
errors.botDisabledChannel: The bot has been disabled in this channel.
errors.commandDisabledServer: The command you're trying to execute has been disabled in this server.
errors.commandDisabledChannel: The command you're trying to execute has been disabled in this channel.
errors.buttonNotForYou: Hey, this button is not for you. At least you tried.
errors.lastFmFailureRate: In the last hour they've returned an error on {{percentage}}% of our requests.  `{{sparkline}}`
artist.notFoundWithValues: Artist `{{artist}}` could not be found, please check your search values and try again.
artist.noLastFmResult: Last.fm did not return a result for **{{artist}}**.
artist.infoFailed: Something went wrong while trying to get artist info.
album.notFoundWithValues: Album `{{album}}` by `{{artist}}` could not be found, please check your search values and try again.
album.notFound:
Album could not be found, please check your search values and try again.

You can also enter the exact value with the | separator. Example: `artist name | album name`.
album.noAlbumOnTrack:
The track you're scrobbling (**{{track}}** by **{{artist}}**) does not have an album associated with it according to Last.fm.
Please note that .fmbot is not associated with Last.fm.
album.noLastFmResult:
Last.fm did not return a result for **{{album}}** by **{{artist}}**.
This usually happens on recently released albums or on albums by smaller artists. Please try again later.

Please note that .fmbot is not associated with Last.fm.
album.infoFailed: Something went wrong while trying to get album info.
track.notFoundWithValues: Track `{{track}}` by `{{artist}}` could not be found, please check your search values and try again.
track.notFound:
Track could not be found, please check your search values and try again.

You can also enter the exact value with the | separator. Example: `artist name | track name`.
track.noLastFmResult:
Last.fm did not return a result for **{{track}}** by **{{artist}}**.

This usually happens on recently released tracks. Please try again later.

judge.intro: Want your music taste to be judged by AI?
judge.usesLeftToday_one: You can use this command `{{count}}` more time today.
judge.usesLeftToday_other: You can use this command `{{count}}` more times today.
judge.supporterPerkModel: ⭐ Supporter perk: Using premium AI model
judge.outOfUses: You've run out of command uses for today.
judge.outOfUsesFree: You've run out of command uses for today, unfortunately the service we use for this is not free.
judge.supporterPromo:
⭐ Become a supporter for better judgements
-# Unlocks a better model and other perks for more insights into your music taste
judge.supporterPromoLimit:
⭐ Become a supporter for better judgements
-# Unlocks an improved model with better output and a higher daily usage limit
judge.apiError: OpenAI API error - please try again
judge.loadingRoastSelf: Loading your roast (don't take it personally)...
judge.noTopResults: Sorry, you or the user you're searching for don't have any top artists or top tracks in the selected time period.
update.nothingNew: Nothing new found on [your Last.fm profile]({{url}}) since the last time we checked {{timestamp}}.
update.spotifyConnectionExpired: Using Spotify? Your connection to Last.fm might have expired, which stops scrobbling completely. Reconnect by pressing **Disconnect** and then **Connect** next to 'Spotify Scrobbling' in [your Last.fm settings](https://www.last.fm/settings/applications).
update.outOfSyncHint: Last.fm not keeping track of your Spotify properly? Try the instructions in `{{command}}` for help.
update.playcountsUpdated: ✅ Cached playcounts have been updated for {{user}} based on {{newScrobbles}}.
update.playcountsUpdatedWithRemoved: ✅ Cached playcounts have been updated for {{user}} based on {{newScrobbles}} and {{removedScrobbles}}.
update.advancedUpdateDisabled: Doing an advanced update is disabled temporarily while Last.fm is having issues. Please try again later.
update.fullUpdateCooldown:
You can't do full updates too often. These are only meant to be used when your Last.fm history has been adjusted.

Using Spotify and having problems with your music not being tracked or it lagging behind? Please use `{{command}}` for help. Spotify sync issues can't be fixed inside of .fmbot.
update.advancedUpdateAlreadyStarted: An advanced update has recently already been started for you. Please wait before starting a new one.
update.cachesBeingRebuilt: The following playcount caches are being rebuilt:
update.supporterFullHistory: *Thanks for being an .fmbot {{userType}}. Your full Last.fm history will now be cached, so this command might take slightly longer...*
update.fullUpdateFailed: Full update could not complete, something went wrong. Please try again later.
update.lastfmUpdateError: ❌ A Last.fm error occurred while attempting to update `{{user}}`:
update.errorUserInfo: - Could not fetch user info from Last.fm
update.importTotal: Combined with your **{{importCount}}** imported plays you have a total of **{{totalCount}}** plays.
update.supporterPromoHistory: Want your full Last.fm history to be stored in the bot? [Get .fmbot supporter]({{url}}).
chart.tooManyImages:
You can't create a chart with more than 100 images (10x10).
Please try a smaller size.
chart.notEnoughAlbumsArtist: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) from **[{{artist}}]({{url}})** in {{period}} time period.
chart.tryDifferentArtistFilter: Try a smaller chart, bigger time period ({{periods}}) or remove the artist filter.
chart.notEnoughAlbumsGenre_one: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genre in {{period}} time period.
chart.notEnoughAlbumsGenre_other: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genres in {{period}} time period.
chart.tryDifferentGenres: Try a smaller chart, a bigger time period ({{periods}}) or different genres.
chart.notEnoughAlbums: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in {{period}} time period.
chart.tryDifferent: Try a smaller chart or a bigger time period ({{periods}}).
chart.extraAlbumsRequired: Note that {{amount}} extra albums are required because you are skipping albums without an image.
chart.notEnoughReleaseYear:
Sorry, you haven't listened to enough albums released in {{year}} ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) to generate a chart.
Please try a smaller chart, a different year or a bigger time period ({{periods}})
chart.notEnoughReleaseDecade:
Sorry, you haven't listened to enough albums released in the {{decade}}s ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) to generate a chart.
Please try a smaller chart, a different year or a bigger time period ({{periods}})
chart.notEnoughNonSingles:
Sorry, not enough non-single albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) to generate a chart.
Please try a smaller chart or a bigger time period ({{periods}})
chart.notEnoughArtistsGenre_one:
Not enough scrobbled artists ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genre for a chart this size. 
Please try a smaller chart, a bigger time period ({{periods}}) or different genres.
chart.notEnoughArtistsGenre_other:
Not enough scrobbled artists ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genres for a chart this size. 
Please try a smaller chart, a bigger time period ({{periods}}) or different genres.
chart.notEnoughArtists:
User hasn't listened to enough artists ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) for a chart this size. 
Please try a smaller chart or a bigger time period ({{periods}}).
chart.extraArtistsRequired: Note that {{amount}} extra artists are required because you are skipping artists without an image.
chart.albumsFiltered_one: {{count}} album filtered due to images that are not allowed to be posted on Discord.
chart.albumsFiltered_other: {{count}} albums filtered due to images that are not allowed to be posted on Discord.
chart.artistsFiltered_one: {{count}} artist filtered due to images that are not allowed to be posted on Discord.
chart.artistsFiltered_other: {{count}} artists filtered due to images that are not allowed to be posted on Discord.

chart.containsNsfwImages: **⚠️ Contains NSFW images - Click to reveal**

chart.filterReleaseDecade: - Filtering to albums released in the {{decade}}s
chart.rainbow: - Secret rainbow option enabled! (Not perfect, but hey, it somewhat exists)
chart.coverTip: *Linus Tech Tip: Use `{{command}}` if you just want to see an album cover.*

overview.daysNotShown_other: {{count}} days not shown because of no plays.

jumble.dailyLimitReached: You've used up all your {{limit}} jumbles of today. Get supporter to play unlimited jumble games and much more.
jumble.dailyLimitReachedPixel: You've used up all your {{limit}} pixel jumbles of today. Get supporter to play unlimited jumble games and much more.
jumble.premiumServerUpsell: -# Or unlock 60 daily games for everyone in this server with Premium server.
jumble.playedAllToday: You've played all jumbles that are available for you today. Come back tomorrow or scrobble more music to play again.
jumble.albumCoverError: Sorry, something went wrong while getting the album cover for your album.
jumble.addAnswerDescription: Type your answer within {{seconds}} seconds to make a guess
jumble.noStatsUser: No stats available for this user.

jumble.noStatsServer: No stats available for this server.
jumble.giveUpNotYours: You can't give up on someone else's game.
jumble.nobodyGuessedArtist: Nobody guessed it right. It was `{{answer}}`

jumble.reactionPermissionError:
❌ Error: I can't properly process your jumble answers, because this server hasn't given me the necessary permissions.
Please ensure .fmbot has access to the **Add Reactions** and **Read Message History** permissions.
jumble.attachFilesPermissionRequired: The bot is missing the `Attach Files` permission in this channel, which is required for playing Pixel Jumble properly. Please grant it server-wide via `Server Settings` > `Roles`, or per-channel via the channel permissions.
jumble.addReactionsPermissionRequired: The bot is missing the `Add Reactions` permission in this channel, which is required for playing Jumble properly. Please grant it server-wide via `Server Settings` > `Roles`, or per-channel via the channel permissions.
